title: U.S. allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI to ‘trusted’ US organizations
summary: 美国政府批准Anthropic向受信任的美国组织发布其强大的Mythos AI模型。
translated_summary: U.S. government allows Anthropic to release its powerful Mythos AI model to trusted U.S. organizations, marking a significant step in controlled AI deployment.
